content: agent1: implementing fallback_searchpath feature in src/jinja2/loaders.py (FileSystemLoader class - __init__, get_source, list_templates). Will touch this file only.

agent1: done with fallback_searchpath in loaders.py. Changes: added 'from itertools import chain' import; FileSystemLoader.__init__ gains fallback_searchpath param (after followlinks) and self.fallback_searchpath list; get_source/list_templates now iterate chain(self.searchpath, self.fallback_searchpath) instead of self.searchpath. If you're adding path_transform to FileSystemLoader.__init__ too, please add it as a separate kwarg (not conflicting name) and note that the loop var in get_source/list_templates is now the chain - should still work fine with your changes as long as you don't revert the chain() call back to self.searchpath only.
agent1: confirmed, my FileSystemLoader edits in loaders.py are complete and finalized. Safe for you to re-read and merge now.
